message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.2.9 → 0.3.0 (crates.io v0.3.0)

- Cargo.toml: `asupersync = "0.2.9"` → `"0.3.0"`. The handful of
  fsqlite-* crates that opt into asupersync-backed WAL / VDBE paths
  (e.g. fsqlite-wal, fsqlite-vfs's linux-asupersync-uring feature)
  pick it up through workspace resolution.
- Cargo.lock: refreshed via `cargo update`, resolving the published
  crates.io asupersync 0.3.0 artifact.

Unrelated in-flight edits from concurrent agents under
crates/fsqlite-btree/ and crates/fsqlite-e2e/ are NOT included in this
commit — they're a separate work stream and will land in their own commits.
